title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves 2 Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its impact on community safety in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's role as a hub for polymer technology and advanced manufacturing.

title: DA Rules Police Shooting in Gastonia Justified
summary: The District Attorney has ruled a police shooting that occurred during an alcohol sales enforcement operation in Gastonia as justified.
charlotte_impact: Addresses police accountability and transparency in law enforcement operations.

title: Charlotte City Council to Hold Public Hearing on Data Center Moratorium
summary: Charlotte City Council schedules a public hearing for May 26 regarding a potential moratorium on data center development.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing debates about balancing economic growth with community concerns.

title: New Belmont Shop Caters to Alternative Scene
summary: The Belmont Bat Cave, a new shop in Belmont, offers alternative clothing, skull accessories, and unique decor.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to the cultural diversity and unique retail offerings in the Carolinas.

title: Rock Hill My Ride to Charge $2.50 Fare
summary: Rock Hill My Ride passengers will now be charged $2.50 for public transportation, ending the previous no-cost service.
charlotte_impact: Impacts accessibility and affordability of public transportation for residents.

title: Two Fatalities in Rowan County House Fire
summary: A late-night house fire in Rowan County resulted in the deaths of two individuals.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of fire safety and emergency response in residential areas.

title: Man Charged in South Charlotte Strip Club Shooting
summary: A 22-year-old man has been charged with shooting another person at Club Onyx in South Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses crime and safety concerns associated with nightlife establishments.

title: UNC Charlotte Ends Gender-Affirming Housing
summary: UNC Charlotte discontinues gender-affirming housing to comply with federal guidance, while affirming support for all students.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing debates about inclusivity and compliance with federal regulations in higher education.

title: Man Impersonates Officer in Road Rage Incident
summary: A driver is accused of impersonating a police officer using blue lights during a road rage incident.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and the potential for abuse of authority.

title: Arson Investigation Underway After Apartment Fire
summary: Police are investigating an apartment fire in north Charlotte as arson, after heavy smoke was seen billowing from four units.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risk of arson and its impact on residential communities.

title: Elementary Teacher Arrested for Assaulting Student
summary: A Catawba County elementary teacher, Christina McCarthy, was arrested for allegedly assaulting a student.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about student safety and professional conduct in schools.

title: Dry and Mild Weather Expected This Week, Heat Wave by Weekend
summary: The weather forecast predicts dry and mild conditions this week, with a heat wave expected by the weekend.
charlotte_impact: Provides important weather information for residents to prepare for upcoming conditions.

title: NC Resident Onboard Cruise Ship with Hantavirus Outbreak
summary: North Carolina confirms one resident was onboard a cruise ship experiencing a hantavirus outbreak; state monitoring closely.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential health risks associated with travel and disease outbreaks.

title: Novant Health Seeks Approval for Emergency Department in SouthPark
summary: Novant Health is seeking approval for a $21.3 million freestanding emergency department in SouthPark, slated for completion in 2029.
charlotte_impact: Addresses healthcare accessibility and infrastructure development in the SouthPark area.
